markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss content approval, design issues, and upcoming project priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Maddy approved the company type page and partners page for publishing; GrowthX can move forward with the six other pages without additional approvals](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Design resources are a pain point - templates project is delayed due to quality/resource issues at GrowthX; discussion needed about contract alignment for design work](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Call flow design hub strategy will focus on business relevance plus search volume, with simplified initial approach leveraging Aether's existing design components](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

## Topics

### Content Approvals and Next Steps

  - [Maddy approved the company type page and partners page designs for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Partners page updates included changing from blue to black/tan color schemes, adding modules, and updating text](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Minor copy edits needed on partners page: update "our team of live agents" to include "AI receptionist" references](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [GrowthX to publish the six remaining company type pages without additional review](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Next page priorities: complete company types, then work on agency/reseller/wholesale/referral/affiliate pages, then city pages](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Design Resource Challenges

  - [Templates project significantly delayed due to multiple handoffs (Elvis → Ray's → internal marketing designer)](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Design quality doesn't meet expectations; basic alignment and consistency issues present](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Maddy expressed frustration about design quality, noting "it just was a poor design job"](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Contract structure doesn't explicitly include design work, creating resource allocation issues](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [GrowthX internal teams use different project management systems, causing coordination difficulties](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Maddy suggested either: 1) Improve GrowthX design capabilities as core competency, or 2) Be transparent about limitations so Smith.ai can use their contractors (Jeff @ $125/hr)](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### Call Flow Design Hub Strategy

  - [Jo recommended a simplified approach for the call flow design hub content, focusing on SEO fundamentals](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Current ranking pages for target keywords are "modest/thin" content, so no need for extensive initial development](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Strategy will prioritize business relevance keywords plus search volume considerations](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Smith.ai's existing Aether-designed components (shown on enterprise page) can be leveraged for call flow visuals](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Content workflow: Google Doc first for feedback, then staging, then publish](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

### Contract Alignment Discussion

  - [Current contract language based on word count doesn't align with actual project needs](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Maddy needs visibility into deliverables to justify contract renewal](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [GrowthX acknowledges contract language needs updating to be more flexible](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Need to determine design team capabilities and bandwidth before committing to design deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to publish company type page and partners page with minor copy edits](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Jo will add custom prompts and suggest adding FAQ section to multi-location business page](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Jo to create Google Doc draft of call flow design hub content](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Megan to discuss design resources internally and determine bandwidth/capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Megan to explore starting templates over with proper design principles vs. cleaning up existing versions](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Team to evaluate whether contract language needs updating to better reflect actual work](https://fathom.video/share/xntY9RcDxqJ2xEcGz_ntFtXTBxT7tpKW?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
